'''Droon''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] who helped [[Frija Torlock]] try to rule [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] by killing [[Wrenga Jixton]]. After discovering the plot, Jixton handed Droon to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] who forced him into a duel with a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], where he was defeated by Vader and executed.

{{Char-stub}}
